---
title: Lobster Report
author: Lala Movsesian and Noor Abuzahriyeh
---


## Setup

Loading libraries:

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(here)
library (forcats)

```


Data from the link below on 04/16/2026
 https://portal.edirepository.org/nis/mapbrowse?packageid=knb-lter-sbc.77.8
 
 
Loading data:

```{r}
lobster_abundance <- read_csv(here("data/Lobster_Abundance_All_Years_20220829.csv"))
```


## Summary of abstract:

## Visualization
